experience.position: Senior AI Partner Engineer II (Forward Deployed Engineer)
achievements: Serve as a cross-functional forward deployed AI transformation partner, managing end-to-end technical relationships and co-developing production-grade agentic workflows integrated across business units.
Establish systematic evaluation frameworks for deployed workflows to capture field signals for the AI Native Platform, delivering reusable patterns that accelerate subsequent deployments.
Own build-versus-buy decisions across the AI-native vendor market — separating genuine capability from positioning — to steer investment toward the highest-leverage builds.

Safeguard real-time location and family-relationship data for ~98M members, including minors — engineering data boundaries into every workflow from the first line, in partnership with Legal, Privacy, and Security.

experience.position: Senior Software Engineer, AI Platform Ops
achievements: Owned the AI Ops function for an internal AI platform powering 2,000+ dev and prod workflows — ~18K automated executions/month (1.13M+ lifetime) across product, regulatory compliance, CX, analytics, and agent orchestration.

Hardened security and cost governance across ~7,000 automations by defining an enterprise governance framework — a FinOps cost-benefit algorithm plus multi-agent audits of 1,900+ processes that surfaced bottlenecks and risks like credential leaks.

Shipped an autonomous AI code-review verdict subsystem — built across 29 PRs — that has since adjudicated ~86K reviews across 700+ repos, hardened to verify check execution before honoring any verdict.
Achieved an 80% one-week resolution rate across 414 tickets and 23 AI SDLC epics through orchestrated agentic execution.

Improved annual Deposit CSAT from 72.7% to 77.8% (+5.1 points) through refined research methods and detractor oversampling; identified a perceived-failure gap that shifted the roadmap to focus on error communication.
Led “My Stat Sheet” from insight to launch — 30% engagement across 13M+ visits in year one, growing to ~46% across 21M+ visits in year two (+52% YoY engagement).
Synthesized CSAT and player safety data to highlight credit-card deposit risks, providing the evidence base for the company’s transition away from credit-card funding.
Directed multi-phase responsible-gaming research, reframing player protection as a brand driver to guide messaging and tooling strategy.
Established a continuous product-intelligence workflow built on session replays and quantified behavioral signals, accelerating decision-making for teams shipping customer-facing financial tools.
Architected a multi-system web infrastructure and redesigned the digital journey for a venue serving 20k+ monthly visitors, using multi-method research to optimize user flow.
Executed end-to-end product design for SMBs and non-profits, translating research into technical specs and flows that drove a 46% increase in patient bookings.
Directed the full delivery lifecycle across diverse client portfolios, ensuring rigorous technical feasibility and on-time implementation.
